ogTitle: Kersbrook vs Keswick Terminal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kersbrook and Keswick Terminal.
heading: Kersbrook vs Keswick Terminal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kersbrook, South Australia and Keswick Terminal, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kersbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Keswick Terminal (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kersbrook or Keswick Terminal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kersbrook has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Keswick Terminal scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kersbrook scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Keswick Terminal scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kersbrook or Keswick Terminal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kersbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
